description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG by shooting a bouncing projectile which bounces [4->3] times starting from the nearest enemy. The further the enemy, the more DMG inflicted.
Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies [furthest away in a small range->a random enemy and nearby enemies], and stuns them for [1 sec->3 sec]. The further the enemy, the more DMG they will take.
Deals ??? M.DMG to target enemies in range, and reduces target's Crit Chance by [60%->100%] for [4 sec->7 sec].

[(added) When inflicted by CC, dispels negative effects from self and] attacks the farthest enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking it away for [1 sec->2 sec]. [(removed) increasing M.DMG taken by 20% for 6 sec]

light.unified: Gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill.

dark.unified: Enemies hit are stunned for [1 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: In exchange for [2000->2] additional Mana Cost, attacks [nearest neighbors->random enemies] [4 times->3 times].
Reduces ACC of hit enemies by [500->150] for [4 sec->7 sec].

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, knock back the enemy over a long distance.

description.unified: [Pew!] Increases DMG by [ {0}% -> 20% ], and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by [ 200 -> {0} ].
[Twinkle Twinkle] [M.Crit Resist reduction->Crit Chance Reduction] will not be dispelled, and the effect duration will increase by {0} sec.
[Gotcha!] [Greatly increases the knockback range->cleanses self when affected by a CC once every 20 sec], and Cooldown is reduced by {0} sec.

dark.unified: Grants Blessing of the Carrot. Blessing of the Carrot increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [15%->30%], and reduces DMG received by [15%->30%].

description.unified: Increases Crit DMG by {0}%, DMG of normal attacks by {1}% and the Range by {2}%.

Summons the Soul of Flower of Eternity, Hyacinth, dealing ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies within a circular range of self, freezing them for 5 sec and knocking them back [far away]. Afterward, the Soul of Hyacinth deals ??? additional M.DMG to frozen enemies and increases own Crit DMG by 100% for 10 sec.

1.from: For the duration, increases Normal Attack range by 20%.
1.to: Hit targets take increased M.DMG by 40% for 10 sec.
1.unified: Hit targets take increased M.DMG by 40% for 10 sec.

2.from: For the duration, increases NFor the duration, Normal Attacks hit 2 targets and knock them back for 1 sec.ormal Attack range by 2%.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, increases the number of targets that Normal Attacks hit by 3. The range of Normal Attacks increases by 30%, knocking back the hit target.
2.unified: For the duration of Skill, increases the number of targets that Normal Attacks hit by 3. The range of Normal Attacks increases by [2%->30%], knocking back the hit target.
